allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\laragon\\bin\\php","D:\\laragon\\bin\\php"\); $found = @\(\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Directory | ForEach-Object { $exe = Join-Path $_.FullName 'php.exe'; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { $found += $exe } } } }; if \($found\) { $found } else { "NONE in laragon/bin; szukam szerzej..."; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\,D:\\ -Filter php.exe -Recurse -Depth 4 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName })
